name_en: Town-Division Map of the 9th Year of Genna
description_en: A town-division map dated to the 9th year of Genna, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Forest-Regulation Notice Board Inscribed with the 2nd Year of Meireki
description_en: A forest-regulation notice board dated to the 2nd year of Meireki, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Yoshino.
A letter classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Pictorial Map of the Kyōhō Era
description_en: A pictorial map from the Kyōhō era classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Akayu.
A three-seal document concerning land-tax reduction, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Shinden.

A letter of correspondence by Suishinshi Masahide, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Motonakayama.

name_en: Mujina no Gosho (Stone Stupa Slab of the 2nd Year of Kenmu)
description_en: A stone stupa slab (itabi) dated to the 2nd year of Kenmu, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Matsuzawa.

A stone reaping knife classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Hagiuda.

name_en: Amida Stone Stupa Slab Inscribed with the 7th Year of Kōan
description_en: An Amida stone stupa slab (itabi) dated to the 7th year of Kōan, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Kōriyama.

description_en: A building ridge tablet (munafuda) dated to the 3rd year of Ōtoku, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of historical materials. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Ikeguro.
